title: RBI imposes monetary penalty on Muthoot Housing Finance Company Limited
description: The Reserve Bank of India (RBI) has, by an order dated April 21, 2026, imposed a monetary penalty of ₹80,000/- (Rupees Eighty Thousand only) on Muthoot Housing Finance Company Limited (the company) for non-compliance with certain directions issued by RBI on ‘Fair Practice Code’. This penalty has been imposed in exercise of powers conferred on RBI under the provisions of Section 52A of the National Housing Bank Act, 1987.
